I see people talking about "closed" and "open" books, what is the difference? Is it whether you have to right click to read it like tradeskill books and notes? Sounds to me that is what it means.

# Dec 08 2003 at 12:01 AM Rating: Decent

Just graphics.

#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 10 2001 at 10:50 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Take a look at the picture why is the background around the wording all different and effect is blank?
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 11:56 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Good grief, why is it every time some new item gets posted, there's always gotta be some stupid newbie whiner calling it a fake? GROW UP AND GET A LIFE!
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 4:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) tired, tired, tired of noobs calling everything fake... level a bit and you might actually get outside crushbone and see some better items than screaming mace...
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 12:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) d00d, the screaming mace is 1337. Don't mess wit it!

Not Fake; I own one of these.
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2001 at 12:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246039895
2 posts
This is one of the few casters items that came out of Sleeper's Tomb while we were there. The stats on it aren't really applicable for most high level casters to use it over epics, and the effect is bugged.

Also: Yes it is Primary slot only. I like to think of this is Kendrick's sick caster joke when you compare this "primary" slot item with the absolutely fantastic "primary" slot melee weapons he put into Sleeper's.

[60 Phantasmist] Lelaniel (High Elf) <Fires of Heaven>
▲ Page top
RE: Not Fake; I own one of these.
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2001 at 1:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749866210
6 posts
But, it is tradeable...... for now....
Lower level casters would love to hold one these...
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 11 2001 at 12:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Its fake but not because the effect slot is blank. I have seen real items that have blank effect slots. Its fake because it is a Primary slot item with no attack damage or delay...you cannot hold a non-weapon melee item in your primary slot only...it would have to be secondary and primary to be legit.
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 26 2002 at 3:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) all i have to say is: n00b
RE: Fake
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2001 at 10:46 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754606249
11 posts
Another example - my druid is carrying around the prophecy scroll in her primary slot (only place it will go). About the only thing I could do to a mob with that is a very serious paper cut.

RE: Fake

# Apr 11 2001 at 1:36 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592246404004
14 posts
since when have primary hand items been required to have attack or damage statistics? Ever seen the glowing black stone? Stein of Mogguk? several book type items you can hold in primary as well (black tome with silver runes) etc. Before you speak with certainty try being correct first.

Sylron
▲ Page top
RE: Fake
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2001 at 11:39 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Because JPG compression does that, look at the other six thousand images on this site and you'll see the same. The fact that its a larger image doesn't mean that will go away, just not as bad. This is real :)
▲ Page top
RE: Fake
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2001 at 11:49 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
It is that way due tostarting life as an inferior bmp and having been scaled up it loses resolution causethe pixels arent there to have the larger size so thay are guessed in by the software used to enlarge it. Also i have seen other not fake items which have the effect bit there and no effect
▲ Page top
